cards.title: Anthropic Files for IPO
cards.body: Anthropic announced Monday it has filed confidentially for an initial public offering. The AI safety company joins other major AI firms in pursuing public markets.

cards.title: SpaceX IPO Faces Water Access Challenge
cards.body: SpaceX disclosed in IPO filings that significant water resources are needed to cool data centers. The company identifies access to abundant, affordable water as a major risk factor.

cards.title: Windborne's Weather AI Beats Government
cards.body: Windborne Systems' latest weather forecasting model outperforms government agencies' predictions by days. The startup demonstrates AI's capability in meteorological forecasting.

cards.title: DuckDuckGo Expands No-AI Search Option
cards.body: DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox browsers. The alternative search engine capitalizes on growing user traffic seeking AI-free search.

cards.title: SoftBank Invests €75B in French Data Centers
cards.body: SoftBank commits up to €75 billion to build French data center infrastructure. The investment targets 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity development.

cards.title: Github Copilot's Token Billing Sparks Backlash
cards.body: Microsoft's Github Copilot introduces token-based billing, ending its free golden age. Developers express significant frustration over the new pricing model.

cards.title: Meta Develops AI Pendant Hardware
cards.body: Meta is reportedly developing an AI-powered pendant device. The move signals major investments in AI-enabled wearable hardware.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Automates Daily Tasks
cards.body: Google's 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark helps automate tasks from inbox summaries to event planning. The separate product offering raises questions about Google's strategic product positioning.

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M, Pivots to AI Inference
cards.body: AI chip startup Groq is raising $650 million in internal funding. The company shifts focus from hardware to AI inference optimization and response refinement.

cards.title: Cognition's Devin Won't Replace Human Coders
cards.body: Cognition CEO Scott Wu says AI coding agent Devin isn't designed to supplant programmers. The company emphasizes human-AI collaboration over replacement in software development.

cards.title: AI Coding Speeds Production, Quality Questions Remain
cards.body: Developers increasingly refuse to work without AI tools, but researchers warn code quality may suffer. Fast production doesn't guarantee better code, creating future technical debt risks.

cards.title: CEOs Display 'AI Psychosis' Says Aaron Levie
cards.body: Box founder Aaron Levie warns executives are making AI replacement decisions without understanding jobs. ClickUp's 22% workforce cut for AI agents exemplifies this disconnect.

cards.title: AI Terminology Glossary for 2026
cards.body: AI's rise has introduced an avalanche of new terms and industry slang. A comprehensive glossary clarifies definitions of essential AI vocabulary and phrases.

cards.title: Erin Brockovich Targets Data Center Secrecy
cards.body: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich launches new mission against data center opacity. She focuses on exposing environmental impacts of AI infrastructure.

cards.title: Tech Industry Debates AI Psychosis Among CEOs
cards.body: Latest Equity podcast episode questions whether tech leaders are uniquely susceptible to 'AI psychosis.' Experts debate CEO decision-making patterns in AI implementation.

cards.title: Anthropic Files for IPO
cards.body: The AI safety company Anthropic has filed confidentially for an initial public offering. This marks a major milestone for one of the leading competitors to OpenAI.

cards.title: AI Weather Startup Outforecasts Government
cards.body: Windborne Systems' weather forecasting model beats government predictions by days. The AI-powered approach demonstrates superior accuracy in weather prediction.

cards.title: DuckDuckGo Launches No-AI Search Tools
cards.body: The privacy-focused search engine launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox as traffic booms. Users can now avoid AI-generated results entirely.

cards.title: Github Copilot Token Billing Sparks Backlash
cards.body: Microsoft's Github Copilot shifts to token-based billing, ending its previous pricing model. Developers express frustration over the controversial change.

cards.title: Meta Develops AI-Powered Pendant Hardware
cards.body: Meta is reportedly building an AI pendant as part of its hardware strategy. The device represents the company's push into AI-powered wearables.

cards.title: Google's Gemini Spark Automates Daily Tasks
cards.body: Google's 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark handles inbox summaries and event planning. The tool proves surprisingly useful but raises questions about its separate product status.

cards.title: Coders Refuse Work Without AI Tools
cards.body: Developers increasingly demand AI assistance, but researchers warn the output may sacrifice code quality. The long-term implications for software reliability remain unclear.

cards.title: AI Terminology Glossary Explains Key Terms
cards.body: The rapid rise of AI has created an avalanche of new industry terms and slang. This comprehensive glossary clarifies essential vocabulary for understanding modern AI discussions.

cards.title: CEOs Suffer from 'AI Psychosis'
cards.body: Box founder Aaron Levie argues executives replace jobs without understanding the work involved. He cites ClickUp's 22% workforce cut for AI agents as a cautionary example.

cards.title: Groq Raises $650M for AI Inference
cards.body: The AI chip startup pivots from hardware to focus on AI inference and model optimization. The funding round follows Nvidia's $20B not-acquisition of talent.

cards.title: Devin Creator: AI Shouldn't Replace Coders
cards.body: Cognition's Scott Wu clarifies that Devin, the AI coding agent, complements rather than replaces human programmers. The distinction reflects ongoing debate about AI's role in software development.

cards.title: China Approves First Invasive Brain-Computer Chip
cards.body: A paralyzed patient in Henan province successfully used an implanted brain-computer interface to write with a pen. This marks a major breakthrough in invasive neural AI technology.

cards.title: Pope Calls Technology Never Neutral
cards.body: Pope Leo XIV's encyclical 'Magnifica Humanitas' addresses artificial intelligence and human responsibility. The statement warns technologists and policymakers to act with courage regarding AI.

cards.title: AI Hype Index: Graduates Reject AI Narrative
cards.body: University of Arizona graduates booed former Google CEO Eric Schmidt when he urged them to shape AI. The reaction reveals generational skepticism about AI's promised benefits.

cards.title: OpenAI Model Solves 80-Year Math Problem
cards.body: An OpenAI model successfully solved a famous mathematical problem that eluded humans for decades. The achievement demonstrates advanced reasoning capabilities in specialized domains.

cards.title: Intel Claims Cheaper, Cooler AI Chip
cards.body: Intel announces upcoming AI chips designed to undercut Nvidia and AMD on price and thermal efficiency. The company intensifies competition in the booming AI hardware market.

cards.title: Nvidia RTX Spark Arrives on Windows PCs
cards.body: Nvidia's RTX Spark brings unified memory and RTX GPU capabilities to Windows Arm systems. The technology enhances AI inference performance on edge devices.

cards.title: Robot Training Startup Offers Free Home Cleaning
cards.body: A startup provides complimentary home cleaning services in exchange for recording rights to train robots. The model balances cost savings against privacy concerns.
